prompt: Full 6-Activity Phase Anatomy for Testing: testing-engineer agent produces test suite + docs, separate quality-gate-validator, human review, traceability-analyst + knowledge-curator on approval.
assertions: Test files created in project test/ directories
V-Model levels present: acceptance, system, integration, unit, security
100% AC coverage — every AC mapped to >= 1 test
ITS-*/STS-*/SECTS-* from design implemented as tests
Traceability-analyst updated matrix with test mappings
